text:
OK. Once upon an old time a guy named Chuck tried to lose weight. To start he ran every morning. So he started with five miles. One morning he felt tired though. He wasn’t hungry but went for a walk. So he just clipped some bells on his socks.

They rang everywhere! Everywhere’s nuts. So he kept walking. He saw a cat and snapped pics. He found rocks up ahead. So he stopped. Rocks cool.

Next morning he wanted to jog. Five miles it was. He made it. Slept good. Jogged again. Faster. He had so much fun. Four miles! Then he’d chill.

He started doing curls. He lifted weights. He got buff. Soon he was sprinting. Then fast cycling. Then hiking. Now he bikes long distances.

He never ate junk foods. Never smoked. Never drinks. Just walks. Happy.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
